title: Oni Chichi Rebuild - 03 [Raw](December 2014)
description:
Synopsis  
The latest series of the Airi storyline finds the three main characters adjusting to their current setting of an open adult relationship. The setting is completely disturbed when Airi and Marina's mother, Kayako (華代子), returns and seeks to "rebuild" her relationship with the stepfather, unaware of him having sexual relations with her two daughters. Also the stepfather is becoming more and more abusive to Airi who has been challenging their relationship with another young lady.  
  
[![Image](http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-X05x3dmNaW4/Ui6aotXfMxI/AAAAAAAAAYM/5tRdZxIJfSA/s1600/ss.png)](http://fapforfuns.blogspot.com/2015/01/oni-chichi-rebuild-03-rawdecember-2014.html)

title: Maki-chan to Nau - 04 [Raw](December 2014)
description:
Synopsis  
Based on the visual novel by Waffle.   
  
Sanjou Maki is the girl living next door to Sakonji Seiichi. She appears to be well-bred, gifted with both beauty and brains. However, one night, Seiichi sees her masturbating on the veranda...   
  
Maki easily admits that she's a dirty girl and jokingly suggests to Seiichi that she should be blackmailed into being his sex-slave.  
  
[![Image](http://2.bp.blogspot.com/-X05x3dmNaW4/Ui6aotXfMxI/AAAAAAAAAYM/5tRdZxIJfSA/s1600/ss.png)](http://fapforfuns.blogspot.com/2015/01/maki-chan-to-nau-04-rawdecember-2014.html)

title: Gomennasai complete works as of 1/2015
description:
This torrent contains all of Gomennasai's published works that can be found on the Internet as of this day, month, and year. Also included is a short H webcomic and 2 non-H stories (one of which ran in Comic Shitsurakuten during 2009 for some reason) as well as what seems to be an interview from X-EROS issue 25 (in 「偉大なる詐欺団」).  
  
Enjoy.  
  
Includes:  
\[Gomennasai (Heikou Ki Kaigakuron)\] Kame no Ongaeshi  
\[Gomennasai\] Anoko wa Toshi Densetsu That Girl is an Urban Legend \[English\]  
\[Gomennasai\] Best Wishes to You! (COMIC X-EROS Vol.04)  
\[Gomennasai\] Dasshutsu! Chibikko Senyou Sharyou Ch.1-3  
\[Gomennasai\] Dedicated to all guys who love 2-D loli  
\[Gomennasai\] Don't mind ★ Fruit Punch Sensei!!

\[Gomennasai\] なないろ公園の夢子さん
